CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)) && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal"),"Lost", IF(ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c) && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal"),"Closed - Client Abandoned Proposal", IF(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed - No Change"),"Closed - No Change", IF(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed-No Bid"), "Closed-No Bid", IF(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed - SCP Declined"), "Closed - SCP Declined", IF(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed - No Change/Lost"), "Lost", IF(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed Lost"),"Lost", IF(ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Confirm Customer Satisfaction") || ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Implement") || ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Closed - Consulting Project Complete"),"Won", "Open" ))))))))
CustomField.label: Win/Loss/Open
